The Washington’s State Department of Transportation is hit by a cyberattack that causes a range of issues for local ferries and apps used for maps.
The Pulaski County Public Schools are hit with a ransomware attack.

author: NoName057(16)
description: The Pro-Russian hacktivists from NoName057(16) launch a DDoS attack against five targets in Italy including a subdomain of the Ministry of Defense, and a primary bank (Credito Cooperativo.)

author: Anonymous Sudan?
description: OpenAI addresses "periodic outages" due to DDoS attacks targeting its API and ChatGPT. The pro-Russia group Anonymous Sudan claims responsibility for the attack.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: The LockBit 3.0 ransomware group successfully encrypts files and also allegedly exfiltrates data from Egyptian e-payment provider Fawry.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: The LockBit 3.0 ransomware group adds Amber Hill Group the their leak site.

author: Anonymous Sudan
description: Cloudflare is hit by a DDoS attack. The Pro-Russia group Anonymous Sudan claims responsibility for the attack.
The Butte School District is forced to shut down its computer system to investigate an unknown breach of the network that serves all the public schools in the city.
Warren General Hospital (WGH) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unknown actor accessed certain WGH computer systems.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: The U.S. branch of the Industrial & Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) confirms its services were disrupted by a ransomware attack that impacted its systems. According to rumors, the attack was carried out exploiting the CVE-2023-4966 Citrix Bleed vulnerability.
Threat actors steal more than $100 million worth of Bitcoin and Ethereum from cryptocurrency trading platform Poloniex.

author: Actor231010 AKA SkeletonWolf
description: Researchers from NSFOCUS reveal that a threat actor marked as Actor231010 launched attacks against Russia and Belarus exploiting the CVE-2023-38831 WinRAR vulnerability to deliver the AthenaAgent malware.
A cyberattack affects operations at Tri-City Medical Center.
Southland Integrated Services (SIS) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party gained access to its computer network.
A ransomware attack on the city of Huber Heights, Ohio, causes significant problems for several city systems.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: A threat actor appears to have drained $27 million worth of Tether stablecoins from a crypto wallet tied to Binance.

A cyberattack on international logistics firm DP World Australia severely disrupts the regular freight movement in multiple large Australian ports. According to rumors, the attack was carried out exploiting the CVE-2023-4966 Citrix Bleed vulnerability.

author: Medusa
description: Moneris, a technology company created by two of Canada’s largest banks, is listed in the Medusa ransomware gang leak site, despite the company claims it stopped the access to critical data.
The North Carolina Central University (NCCU) experience some disruptions after suffering a cyber attack.
The West Central District Health Department in Nebraska (WDCHD) confirms to have suffered an unauthorized access to its network and patient data has been exposed.

author: Alpha Team
description: The Alpha Team collective defaces the website of Federpivacy, an Italian Cyber Security organization.
The Henry County Schools in Atlanta warn parents of a cyber incident.

author: Clop AKA Lace Tempest, TA505, and FIN11
description: Medical Eye Services (MESVision) files a notice of data breach after discovering that MOVEit, a software program used by MESVision, contained a critical vulnerability that gave hackers access to confidential data in the company’s possession.
The Harris Center for Mental Health falls victim to a ransomware attack.

author: NoEscape
description: Southeastern Orthopaedic Specialists is added to the NoEscape ransomware gang leak site. The threat actors claim to have exfiltrated 3 GB of data.

author: NoEscape
description: Carespring is added to the NoEscape ransomware gang leak site. The threat actors claim to have exfiltrated 364 GB of data.

author: Clop AKA Lace Tempest, TA505, and FIN11
description: The Medical College of Wisconsin (MCW) confirms that the protected health information of 240,667 individuals was stolen by the Clop hacking group, which exploited the zero day vulnerability in Progress Software’s MOVEit Transfer.
Samsung Electronics notifies some of its UK customers of a data breach that exposed their personal information to an unauthorized individual.

author: ALPHV AKA BlackCat
description: The AlphV/BlackCat ransomware group adds MeridianLink to its leak site and reports its victim to the Securities Exchange Commission (SEC.)
The Californian City of Long Beach warns that it suffered a cyberattack that led to shut down portions of the IT network to prevent the attack's spread.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The North Muskegon Public Schools in Michigan is forced to cancel school after suffering a "cyber incident."

Stanley Steemer International (Stanley Steemer) filed a notice of data breach with the Attorney General of Maine after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access portions of the company’s computer network.
Westside Community Services (Westside Health) file a notice of data breach after discovering that there was unauthorized access to its computer system.
Adams Bank & Trust (ABT) files a notice of data breach after confirming that the bank’s computer system was accessed by an unauthorized party.
Systems East notifies 209,000 consumers after a database with some payment card info is hacked.§
Rusnak Auto Group files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to gain access to the company’s computer network.
Wyoming County Community Health System (WCCHS) files a notice of data breach after discovering that files stored on WCCHS’s network were subject to unauthorized access.

Endocrine and Psychiatry Center in Texas has recently sent notifications to patients advising that some of their protected health information has been removed from its systems by an unauthorized individual.
The official X (Twitter) account for Bloomberg Crypto is used to redirect users to a deceptive website that steals Discord credentials in a phishing attack.
Glendale Community College confirms it was hit with ransomware.

author: Mustang Panda a.k.a. Bronze President, Camaro Dragon, Earth Preta, Luminous Moth, Red Delta, Stately Taurus
description: Researchers from Palo Alto Networks uncover a campaign by the Chinese threat actor Mustang Panda targeting an entity associated with the Philippines government.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Mustang Panda a.k.a. Bronze President, Camaro Dragon, Earth Preta, Luminous Moth, Red Delta, Stately Taurus
target: Entities in the South Pacific including the Philippines government.
description: Researchers from Palo Alto Networks uncover an additional campaign by the Chinese threat actor Mustang Panda targeting entities in the South Pacific including the Philippines government.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Mustang Panda a.k.a. Bronze President, Camaro Dragon, Earth Preta, Luminous Moth, Red Delta, Stately Taurus
target: Entities in the South Pacific including the Philippines government.
description: Researchers from Palo Alto Networks uncover a copycat campaign by the Chinese threat actor Mustang Panda targeting entities in the South Pacific including the Philippines government.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Forward Bank files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access certain files on the company’s computer network.
Service public de l'assainissement francilien (SIIAP), the organization that manages wastewater for nine million people in and around Paris, is hit with a cyberattack.

author: NoEscape
description: The ransomware group NoEscape claims responsibility for a cyberattack to PruittHealth, threatening to release a vast amount of exfiltrated data (1.5TB.)
Cryptocurrency trading and investment firm Kronos Research says $26 million worth of cryptocurrency was stolen from its systems following a cyberattack.
Precisely Software files a notice of data breach after confirming that an unauthorized party was able to gain access to its computer network.

author: SiegedSec
description: The Idaho National Laboratory (INL) confirms they suffered a cyberattack after 'SiegedSec' hacktivists leaked stolen human resources data online.
A threat actor releases 1.9 million lines of data related to Turkish vaccinations, potentially exposing the information of almost 2 million citizens.

author: Clop a.k.a. Lace Tempest, TA505, and FIN11
description: Texas Wesleyan University (TXWES) files a notice of data breach after discovering that a recent data security incident resulted in unauthorized access to the school’s computer network.

target: Two members of civil society from Belgrade
description: The SHARE Foundation reveals that two members of civil society from Belgrade were hit by the Pegasus spyware, exploiting the 'PWNYOURHOME' vulnerability.

author: Al-Toufan, or “The Flood”
description: The website of the Foreign Ministry in Bahrain briefly becomes inaccessible after a cyberattack takes it down, purportedly over the island kingdom’s stance on the ongoing Israel-Hamas war.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Al-Toufan, or “The Flood”
description: The website of the Information Affairs Ministry in Bahrain briefly becomes inaccessible after a cyberattack takes it down, purportedly over the island kingdom’s stance on the ongoing Israel-Hamas war.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Proliance Surgeons files a notice of data breach after discovering that a ransomware attack enabled an unauthorized party to access and encrypt the company’s computer network.

target: Big Brothers Big Sisters of America
description: Big Brothers Big Sisters of America (BBBSA) files a notice of data breach after discovering a recent network security incident impacting the organization’s computer network.
NSC Technologies files a notice of data breach after discovering that a recent cyberattack resulted in an unauthorized party being able to access the company’s IT network.
Sierra County in California experiences a “sophisticated cyberattack."
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Detroit Chassis discloses it was the victim of a sophisticated cyberattack.

author: NoName057(16)
description: The pro-Russia hacktivists from NoName057(16) take down multiple websites in Italy, including PM Giorgia Meloni's website, the website of the Customs and Monopolies Agency, Consob (Italian Companies and Exchange Commission), Assosim and AGCOM (Authority for Communications Guarantees.)

author: NoName057(16)
description: The pro-Russia hacktivists from NoName057(16) take down multiple websites in Italy related to maritime organizations, including the Port of Trieste, the Port of Taranto, and Sinfomar (a software to manage the traffic of ships.)

author: Lazarus a.k.a. Diamond Sleet, ZINC, Labyrinth Chollima
description: Researchers from Microsoft reveal that the North Korean group tracked as Lazarus, has breached Taiwanese multimedia software company CyberLink and trojanized one of its installers to push a malware dubbed LambLoad, in a supply chain attack targeting potential victims worldwide.
Tri Counties Bank files a notice of data breach after discovering that its computer system had been infected with malware.
East River Medical Imaging files a notice of data breach after determining that suspicious activity on its IT network was related to a cyberattack.
Molina Healthcare of Iowa reveals to have discovered an unauthorized access to an employee email.
The HTX crypto exchange run by the blockchain protocol Heco Chain suffers a hack resulting in an $87 million loss in various tokens.

author: Akira
description: The City of Nassau Bay officials reveals to have suffered a “data security incident that caused the encryption of certain systems and files.” The Akira ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Direct debit collection company London & Zurich is hit with a ransomware attack.

author: Clop a.k.a. Lace Tempest, TA505, and FIN11
description: CTS, a U.K.-based provider of managed IT services for law firms and the professional services industry, experiences a cybersecurity incident that is causing ongoing widespread disruption across the legal sector. Fingers are pointed to the Clop ransomware gang exploiting the CVE-2023-4966 CitrixBleed vulnerability.
The cryptocurrency platform KyberSwap says that around $54 million worth of cryptocurrency was stolen during a cyberattack.
UT Health East Texas is not able to accept ambulances to emergency rooms because of a potential cybersecurity incident.
A Bitcoin user is the victim of a recent record-breaking $3 million transaction fee resulting from a hack.

author: Rhysida
description: Slovenian power company Holding Slovenske Elektrarne (HSE) suffers a ransomware attack that compromised its systems and encrypted files, yet the company says the incident did not disrupt electric power production. Finger is pointed to the Rhysida ransomware gang.

author: Cyber Av3ngers
description: The Municipal Water Authority of Aliquippa said on Saturday to have been hacked by the Cyber Av3ngers Iranian-backed cyber group.

author: Cyber Av3ngers
description: The Iranian group Cyber Av3ngers also targets Brewmation, a New York-based company specializing in turnkey brewing and distilling equipment.
Gulf Air discloses it suffered a data breach, but the company claims that operations and vital systems were not affected.
Portneuf Medical Center investigates a possible security breach that has the hospital’s emergency room on divert status.
Ethereum-based project Indexed Finance thwarts two hijacking attempts (one coming from North Korea) on its decentralized autonomous organization, resulting in a bounty of $10,000 worth.

author: NoEscape
description: The NoEscape ransomware group adds Granger Medical Clinic to their leak site, claiming to be in possession of more than than 35 GB sensitive data.

Ardent Health Services, a healthcare provider operating 30 hospitals across six U.S. states, discloses that its systems were hit by a ransomware attack. The breach also affects Lovelace Health System, BSA Health System, Hillcrest HealthCare System, Hackensack Meridian Health, and University of Kansas Health System St. Francis Campus.
A ransomware attack on the "Ethyrial: Echoes of Yore" MMORPG published by the Gellyberry Studios, destroys 17,000 player accounts, deleting their in-game items and progress in the game.

author: Multiple threat actors
description: Researchers from Greynoise report a widespread exploitation of the critical ownCloud vulnerability tracked as CVE-2023-49103 that exposes admin passwords, mail server credentials, and license keys in containerized deployments.

ZeroedIn Technologies files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access the company’s computer network. 1,977,486 people are affected and the impacted organizations include discount store chain Dollar Tree.

author: Black Suit
description: DePauw University warns students that their personal information may have been accessed by hackers who attacked the school. The Black Suit ransomware gang says it was behind the attack, claiming to have stolen 214 GB of data.
Robeson Health Care Corporation states that it had detected malware in its computer systems.
Rivers Casino Des Plaines reports a cyber incident.
Foursquare Healthcare confirms it experienced a ransomware attack in September.
The Kershaw County Public School District is hit by a cyber attack whose responsibility is claimed by the BlackSuit ransomware gang.

author: Qilin
description: The Qilin ransomware group claims responsibility for a cyber attack on Yanfeng Automotive Interiors (Yanfeng), one of the world's largest automotive parts suppliers.
The City of Hendersonville releases a notice this week warning that a group of hackers targeted software the city uses to manage employee information.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: CyberToufan
description: The website of the National Archives of Israel is attacked by pro-Palestinian hackers, who disable the the search function and preven users from accessing archived documents. The information of tens of thousands of users, research experts, historians is also leaked online.
Decentralized finance platform Aerodrome reports a compromise to its front end.
Decentralized finance platform Velodrome reports a compromise to its front end.

target: Aziende Sanitarie di Modena (Azienda USL, Azienda Ospedaliero-Universitaria and Ospedale di Sassuolo Spa)
description: The Modena National Health System suffers a cyber attack and is forced to turn back to pen and paper.
American office supply retailer Staples takes down some of its systems after a cyberattack to contain the breach's impact and protect customer data.
About 60 credit unions are dealing with outages due to a ransomware attack on Ongoing Operations, a widely-used technology provider.
Community Healthcare Network (CHN) files a notice of data breach following a “major network disruption” in which an unauthorized actor was able to gain access to CHN’s computer network.

The Hershey Company, the American manufacturer of popular sweets such as Kit Kat and Reese's Peanut Butter Cups, tells regulators that more than 2,200 people were potentially affected by a data breach after hackers gained access to some of the company’s email accounts.

author: ALPHV a.k.a. BlackCat
description: Accounting software giant Tipalti says it is investigating reports of a ransomware attack after the BlackCat/ALPHV ransomware gang spent the weekend attempting to extort the company and its customers.
The St. Landry Parish Schools district is hit with a ransomware attack.
Taylor University notifies individuals whose information may have been impacted by a ransomware attack discovered in May.
Sharonview Federal Credit Union (Sharonview) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access an employee’s email account.

author: BlackSuit
description: The Groveport Madison Schools is hit with a BlackSuit ransomware attack.
4 Over provides notice of a data security incident. after detecting suspicious activity affecting systems within the network.
Hi-School Pharmacy discloses a ransomware attack.
Rappler, a digital media company in the Philippines, is hit by a massive series of crippling DDoS attacks.
United Home Loans (UHL) files a notice of data breach after discovering that what appeared to be suspicious activity on its computer network turned out to be a cyberattack.

author: DragonForce
target: Heart of Texas Behavioral Health Network
description: Heart of Texas Behavioral Health Network (HOTBHN) notifies certain current and former patients that their personal information may have been accessed as part of cyber security incident.

author: Play
description: The Play ransomware gang lists the Greater Richmond Transit Company (GRTC) in their leak site.
CompleteCare Health Network (CCHN) files a notice of data breach after discovering that the company was the recent victim of a ransomware attack.
Financial Risk Mitigation (FRM) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized actor was able to gain access to its computer system.

author: Hunters International
description: The Hunters International ransomware gang claims to be behind a cyberattack on the Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center (Fred Hutch) that resulted in patients receiving personalized extortion threats.
The University of Wollongong discloses a security breach.

UnitedHealthcare Services (UHC) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access an email account belonging to Equality Health, an Accountable Care Organization that serves some UHC members.

VNS Health (VNS Health Home Care, VNS Health Hospice Care, and VNS Health Personal Care in New York) notify patients that an unauthorized third party gained access to the email accounts of some of its employees and potentially viewed or obtained some of their protected health information.
The Kaunas University of Technology is hit with a cyber attack.

target: Unnamed set-top box provider in UAE
description: A group of threat actors targets a television service in the United Arab Emirates, replacing the original broadcast with graphic footage from the war between Israel and Hamas.

author: Medusa
description: The Medusa ransomware gang claims responsibility for an attack to Glendale Unified School District (GUSD) and leaks dozens of sensitive documents.

A cyberattack at Newsquest, one of the UK’s largest regional media groups, has disrupted operations at its local news outlets, causing intermittent website outages and leaving journalists unable to file stories.
CareTree files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized actor was able to access the CareTree platform
TRISTAR Insurance Group (TRISTAR) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access its computer network through a cyberattack.
HealthAlliance files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party had gained access to the organization’s IT network.
Kyivstar, Ukraine's largest telecommunications service provider serving over 25 million mobile and home internet subscribers, suffers a cyberattack impacting mobile and data services.

ESO Solutions, a provider of software products for healthcare organizations and fire departments, discloses that data belonging to 2.7 million patients has been compromised as a result of a ransomware attack.
The central bank of southern African country Lesotho is facing severe outages due to a cyberattack that was discovered earlier this week.
The District Court of March, in Switzerland, announces it was “the victim of a cyber attack,” likely ransomware.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: LockBit 3.0
description: The LockBit 3.0 ransomware gang targets the Italian cloud service provider Westpole, which is specialized in digital services for public administration. The incident impacts PA Digitale, the government agency that offers services to various local and government organizations.
Keenan & Associates (Kennan) files a notice of data breach after discovering that it was the recent victim of a ransomware attack.
Regional Family Medicine files a notice of data breach after discovering that what initially appeared to be an IT outage was really a cyberattack.
Cardiothoracic and Vascular Surgeons (CTVS) files a notice of data breach after discovering that information on the company’s computer network was subject to unauthorized access.

Health Diagnostic Management (HDM), a provider of non-medical management services for diagnostic imaging centers, discloses a breach of its patient portal after valid credentials for a referring physician from Brooklyn Premiere Orthopedics were used to access the patient portal.
The London Public Library in Ontario is forced to shut down most of its services due to a cyberattack.
Decentralized exchange OKX falls victim to a hack after a private key belonging to the proxy admin owner is leaked. Total losses amount to approximately $2.7 million.

author: Meow
description: The Tulane University is hit with a cyber attack. The Meow ransomware gang claims respomsibility.
The Ledger hardware wallet warns users that a supply chain attack on the 'Ledger dApp Connect Kit' library was found pushing a JavaScript wallet drainer that stole $600,000 in crypto and NFTs.

author: Snatch
description: The Kraft Heinz Company says it is looking into recent claims of data theft made by the Snatch ransomware gang.
Personal and health data belonging to approximately 10,000 people is illegally downloaded from the genetic testing company Asper Biogene’s database.
AMCP Payments Intermediate Company d/b/a Talus Pay files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party had gained access to an employee email account.
Parking app developer EasyPark publishes a notice on its website warning of a data breach it discovered on December 10, 2023, which impacts an unknown number of its millions of users.
American global apparel and footwear giant VF Corporation, the owner of brands like Supreme, Vans, Timberland, and The North Face, discloses a security incident that caused operational disruptions.
Newfound Area School District is recovering from a ransomware attack.
Kahua files a notice of data breach after discovering that the company had fallen victim to a ransomware attack.
MongoDB warns that its corporate systems were breached and that customer data was exposed in a cyberattack that was detected by the company earlier this week.

author: QakBot
target: Multiple Organizations in the Hospitality Sector
description: Researchers from Microsoft warn that QakBot is being distributed again in a phishing campaign pretending to be an email from an IRS employee.
Peer-to-peer trading platform NFT Trader falls victim to a security breach resulting in the theft of nearly $3 million in non-fungible tokens.

Comcast Cable Communications, doing business as Xfinity, discloses that attackers who breached one of its Citrix servers in October also stole customer-sensitive information of over 35 million people from its systems.
A ransomware attack hits Milton Town School District.

author: Predatory Sparrow
description: A cyberattack disrupts the operation of 70% of gas stations throughout Iran. An Israel-linked group called Predatory Sparrow claims responsibility for the attack.

ZOLL Medical Corporation (ZOLL) notifies some ZOLL employees, dependents and beneficiaries that their protected health information (PHI) may have been accessed by an unauthorized party after a ZOLL employee was the victim of a sophisticated email phishing attack.

Erie Family Health Centers confirms that the protected health information of 6,351 patients was potentially accessed or obtained by an unknown threat actor who gained access to the email account of one of its employees.

author: IT Army of Ukraine
description: Hacktivists from the IT Army of Ukraine claim they disrupted the operations of Bitrix24, a Russian provider of customer relationship management (CRM) services.
Liberty Hospital struggles to provide care to patients after an alleged ransomware attack limited its systems.
First American Financial Corporation, the second-largest title insurance company in the United States, takes some of its systems offline to contain the impact of a cyberattack.
Middlefield Banking Company (Middlefield Bank) files a notice of data breach after discovering that the company was the victim of a recent cyberattack.
College of the Canyons warns more than 2,400 affected personnel of a data breach through Keenan & Associates, its insurance provider.
Ubisoft is investigating whether it suffered a breach after images of the company's internal software and developer tools were leaked online.
St Vincent’s Health Australia, Australia’s largest non-profit healthcare provider is hit by a cyberattack this week, resulting in data being stolen from its networks.

author: Cactus
description: Coop Sverige is hit with a ransomware attack, whose responsibility is claimed by the Cactus ransomware gang.
Clay County announces that it fell victim to a ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: DragonForce
description: Yakult Australia, manufacturer of a probiotic milk drink, confirms experiencing a "cyber incident" to both the company's Australian and New Zealand IT systems. A threat actor named DragonForce claims responsibility for the attack and leaks 95 GB of data.

Integris Health patients in Oklahoma receive blackmail emails stating that their data was stolen in a cyberattack on the healthcare network, and if they did not pay an extortion demand, the data would be sold to other threat actors.

author: UNC4841
target: Organizations in the U.S. and APJ
description: Network and email security firm Barracuda says it remotely patched all active Email Security Gateway (ESG) appliances on December 21 against CVE-2023-7102 and CVE-2023-7101,two zero-day bugs exploited by UNC4841 Chinese threat actors.
Downfall, a fan expansion for the popular Slay the Spire indie strategy game, is breached to push the Epsilon information stealer malware using the Steam update system.

author: Homeland Justice
description: The Albanian parliament is targeted by a cyber attack, whose responsibility is claimed by an Iran-linked threat group known as Homeland Justice.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Homeland Justice
description: The same Iran-linked threat group claims responsibility for an attack against One Albania, a telecom company operating in the country.

The National Insurance Board (NIBTT), a key government agency in Trinidad and Tobago that runs the nation’s social security system, is hit with a ransomware attack that will limit its operations for at least the rest of the year.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Scam Sniffer reports that around $3 million was lost to phishing scams on Christmas Day, using Google Ads to promote malicious sites delivering the MS Drainer.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: German hospital network Katholische Hospitalvereinigung Ostwestfalen (KHO) confirms that recent service disruptions at three hospitals (Franziskus Hospital Bielefeld, Sankt Vinzenz Hospital Rheda-Wiedenbrück, Mathilden Hospital Herford) were caused by a Lockbit ransomware attack.

author: DragonForce
description: The Ohio Lottery is forced to shut down some key systems after a cyberattack affected an undisclosed number of internal applications on Christmas Eve. The DragonForce ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: Eagers Automotive, the largest operator of car dealerships in Australia and New Zealand, announces it suffered a cyberattack and was forced to halt trading on the stock exchange as it evaluates the impact of the incident. The Lockbit ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack.
Transformative Healthcare discloses that Fallon Ambulance Services, a company it purchased in 2018, suffered a data breach that affected nearly one million people.
Thunder Terminal, an on-chain trading platform, says that it thwarted an exploit that had targeted 114 wallets on its platform, preventing a $240,000 loss.
The Anna Jaques Hospital is hit with a cyber attack that temporarily forces to divert ambulances to other area hospitals.
Electrostim Medical Services (EMSI) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access its computer system.
Mountain Dermatology Specialists reports an email account breach that was detected on October 26, 2023.
Essen Medical Associates (Essen Health Care) files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party accessed the company’s IT network.
Highlands Oncology Group files a notice of data breach after threat actors targeted the company through a ransomware attack.
Memorial University of Newfoundland (MUN) is hit with a cyberattack that postpones the start of classes in one campus.
Orbit Chain experiences a security breach that results in a loss of $86 million in cryptocurrency, particularly Ether, Dai, Tether, and USD Coin.

author: Qilin
description: Australia's Court Services Victoria (CSV) warns that video recordings of court hearings were exposed after suffering a reported Qilin ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Museum software solutions provider Gallery Systems discloses that its ongoing IT outages were caused by a ransomware attack last week.

target: X account of Canadian senator Amina Gerba
description: The X (formerly Twitter) account of Canadian senator Amina Gerba is hijacked to promote a cryptocurrency scam.

Pays Fouesnantais, a coastal township in Brittany in northwestern France, announces his municipal authority had been hit by a “large-scale” cyberattack that had taken down all of its community services.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Snow'
description: Orange Spain suffers an internet outage after an attacker with the moniker of 'Snow' breaches the company's RIPE account to misconfigure BGP routing and an RPKI configuration.
The X (formerly Twitter) account of American cybersecurity firm and Google subsidiary Mandiant is hijacked to impersonate the Phantom crypto wallet and share a cryptocurrency scam.

target: X account of Brazilian politician Ubiratan Sanderson
description: The X (formerly Twitter) account of nonprofit consortium ‘The Green Grid' is hijacked to promote a cryptocurrency scam.
A firmware hack causes LED curtains in Russia to display ‘Slava Ukraini’ ('Glory to Ukraine')

target: RIPE Network Coordination Center Access (NCC Access)
description: The Regional Internet Registry for Europe, the Middle East, and Central Asia is investigating the compromise of an administrator account that has disrupted network traffic.

target: Housing Authority of the County of San Bernardino (HACSB)
description: The Housing Authority of the County of San Bernardino notifies nearly 19,000 people that their information was compromised in a June cyberattack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The city of Beckley, West Virginia announces to be dealing with a cyberattack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Threat actors steal $3.4 million from DeFi protocol Gamma Strategies, forcing the company to halt deposits while withdrawals remain open.
The Twitter/X account of blockchain security firm CertiK is hijacked to redirect the company's more than 343,000 followers to a malicious website pushing a cryptocurrency wallet drainer.

author: Rhysida
description: The Rhysida ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack against the Lutheran World Federation, one of the WCC’s members.
Cooper Aerobics files a notice of data breach after discovering unauthorized access to its computer network.

target: Harris Center for Mental Health and IDD
description: The Harris Center for Mental Health and IDD files a notice of data breach after discovering that an unauthorized party was able to access portions of the organization’s computer network.
U.S. mortgage lender loanDepot suffers a ransomware attack that causes the company to take IT systems offline, preventing online payments against loans.

author: Black Hunt
description: Tigo Business, the largest mobile carrier in Paraguay, is hit with a Black Hunt ransomware attack.
Flight information display screens at Beirut’s international airport are hacked to display politically motivated messages, and the incident also temporarily affects baggage inspection.

target: Official X Account of Zack Polanski
description: Zack Polanski, the deputy leader of the United Kingdom’s Green Party, has his account hijacked earlier to promote a cryptocurrency scam.

author: Threat actors from China?
target: Official websites of the President’s office, Foreign Ministry, and Tourism Ministry in Maldives
description: The official websites of the President’s office, Foreign Ministry, and Tourism Ministry in Maldives are taken down by a DDoS attack allegedly carried out by threat actors from China.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

target: Official X Account of Hyundai MEA
description: The official Hyundai MEA Twitter/X accounts is hijacked to push scams designed to infect potential victims with cryptocurrency wallet drainer malware.
The official NetgearTwitter/X accounts (together with over 160,000 followers) are the latest hijacked to push scams designed to infect potential victims with cryptocurrency wallet drainer malware.
Toronto Zoo, the largest zoo in Canada, it is hit with a ransomware attack.

author: Hunters International
description: Blackstone Valley Community Health Care discloses a Hunters International ransomware attack.
Researchers from Fortinet discover a malicious PyPI package named discordpy_bypass-1.7.

author: BlackBasta
description: Synlab Italia suspends all its medical diagnostic and testing services after a ransomware attack forced its IT systems to be taken offline. The BlackBasta ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack.
Valley Mountain Regional Center discloses a breach.
Token infrastructure platform Hedgey Finance undergoes two simultaneous exploits that resulted in a combined loss of $44.7 million

author: LockBit
target: Medios de Prevención Externos Sur SL
description: Medios de Prevención Externos Sur SL, a medical company servicing Spain's Guardia Civil, is hit with a LockBit ransomware attack.

Almost 2,800 patients at Catholic Medical Center may have had their files containing personal and health information exposed in a third-party "data security incident" occurred to Lamont Hanley & Associates.

An unidentified threat actor hacks the website of Czech News Agency (CTK) a government-owned Czech news service, and publishes a fake story claiming that an assassination attempt had been made against the newly elected Slovak president, Petr Pellegrini.
The Russian independent news website Meduza faces repeated attempts to disrupt its digital infrastructure.

author: BlackSuit
description: The plasma donation company Octapharma suffers a BlackSuit ransomware attack.

author: Medusa
description: The Medusa ransomware group claims responsibility for a cyberattack on the servers of Northeast Ohio Neighborhood Health (NEON), a company providing healthcare services, and the exfiltration of nearly 51GB of data.

target: Los Angeles County Department of Health Services
description: ​The Los Angeles County Department of Health Services discloses a data breach after thousands of patients' personal and health information was exposed in a phishing attack impacting over two dozen employees.
Berry, Dunn, McNeil & Parker, a consulting firm with a medical data analytics business notifies more than 1 million individuals that threat actors stole their information from company servers.

Financial Business and Consumer Solutions (FBCS) warns initially 1,955,385 impacted individuals in the United States that the company suffered a data breach after discovering unauthorized access to specific systems in its network. One month later the company says over 3.2 million people have been impacted.
The California Statewide Automated Welfare System discloses that more than 19,000 online accounts may have been accessed by threat actors for nearly a year.
Designed Receivable Solutions (DRS), confirms the details of a data breach affecting 585,204 individuals.
Coffee County is hit with a cyber attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: LockBit
description: ​Canadian pharmacy chain London Drugs closes all its retail stores to contain what it described as a "cybersecurity incident." One month later the LockBit ransomware operation claims responsibility for the attack.

Researchers from QAX discover a new Android backdoor malware named 'Wpeeper' in at least two unofficial app stores mimicking the Uptodown App Store, a popular third-party app store for Android devices with over 220 million downloads. The malware uses compromised WordPress sites to act as relays for its actual command and control (C2) servers, acting as an evasion mechanism.

author: Ukraine’s military intelligence agency, the GUR
description: Ukraine’s military intelligence agency, the GUR, launches a DDoS attack against the website of Russia's ruling party United Russia.
The Kansas City Scout System is taken down by a cyberattack.
Panda Restaurant Group discloses a data breach after threat actors compromised its corporate systems and stole the personal information of an undisclosed number of associates.

Cloud storage firm Dropbox says threat actors breached production systems for its Dropbox Sign eSignature platform and gained access to authentication tokens, MFA keys, hashed passwords, and customer information.
Pike Finance suffers its second exploit in three days, resulting in the loss of $1.68 million worth of digital assets.
The conservative news website Human Events is also hacked and replaced with a page leaking private information.

author: LockBit
description: The City of Wichita, Kansas, discloses it was forced to shut down portions of its network after suffering a weekend ransomware attack. The LockBit ransomware operation claims responsibility for the attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Philadelphia-based real estate company Brandywine Realty Trust discloses to have fell victim to a ransomware attack that disrupted some of its business applications.

author: Pro-Russia threat actors
target: Kosovo government websites, including the websites of the president and prime minister
description: Pro-Russia threat actors target Kosovo government websites, including the websites of the president and prime minister, with DDoS attacks. The attacks are a retaliation for Kosovo’s support of Ukraine with military equipment.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Coradix-Magnescan, a French company that provides medical radiological imaging, warns patients it is currently dealing with a cyberattack that risks “complicating” their appointments.

author: NoName057(16)
description: The Pro-Russia Hacktivists of NoName057(16) take down several italian websites including the Ministry of Made in Italy, the Financial Police, and the Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The Library of Congress was targeted in a cyberattack that occurred in parallel with a high-profile intrusion into the United Kingdom’s British Library in late October, but the threat actors failed to access the U.S. library’s systems.
The WebTPA Employer Services (WebTPA) suffers a data breach impacting close to 2.5 million individuals.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Details of at least 2 million patients with the Regional Cancer Center (RCC) are compromised, affecting 11 out of 14 servers and causing disruptions in many divisions, including the Radiation Department. The attackers demand a ransom.

author: Black Basta
description: ​Ascension, one of the largest private healthcare systems in the United States, takes some of its systems offline to investigate what it describes as a "cyber security event" confirmed to be a Black Basta ransomware attack.
Project management platform Monday.com removes its "Share Update" feature after threat actors abused it in phishing attacks.

Researchers from Phylum identify a malicious Python package that purports to be an offshoot of the popular requests library, concealing a Golang-version of the Sliver command-and-control (C2) framework within a PNG image of the project's logo.

author: Threat actors aligned with Russia
description: Russia-aligned threat actors hijack at least 15 TV channels owned by Starlight Media. to broadcast a Victory Day parade in Moscow, commemorating the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II. The attack is carried out compromising the Astra communication satellites owned and operated by SES, a Luxembourg-based company

Superior Air-Ground Ambulance Service, an Illinois-based air-ground ambulance company notifies more than 858,000 individuals that their sensitive information was compromised in a hacking incident that happened about a year ago.
Have I Been Pwned adds the information for 26,818,266 people whose data was leaked in a recent hack of The Post Millennial conservative news website.

author: Threat actors aligned with Russia
description: A group declaring itself to be “first-class Russian hackers” deface potentially hundreds of local and regional British newspaper websites belonging to Newsquest Media Group.

author: RansomHub
description: A cyber-attack disrupts auction house Christie’s attempts to sell art and other high-value items worth an estimated $840m. The RansomHub ransomware group claims responsibility for the attack.

author: Threat actors aligned with Russia
description: Balticom, a Latvian television network, is also hijacked to air the Moscow parade

author: APT-C-35 a.k.a. DoNot Team.
description: Researchers from Check Point reveal the details of a cyber espionage campaign leveraging an exploit targeting FoxIT reader.
Hypertension-Nephrology Associates discloses a ransomware attack.
Vulnerability
Solana-based memecoin launchpad Pump.fun says that a former employee was behind an exploit that resulted in the misappropriation of approximately 12,300 SOL, valued at about $1.9 million.
The town of Myersville discloses to have suffered a ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Cactus
description: The California-based imaging sensors manufacturer OmniVision warns of a data breach after the company suffered a Cactus ransomware attack last year.

San Antonio-based healthcare provider El Centro Del Barrio (which operates as CentroMed) is informing 400,000 patients that their personal and protected health information was compromised in a recent cyberattack.

author: LockBit 3.0
description: The University of Siena is hit with a LockBit ransomware attack.
An attacker steals more than $206 million and returns $22 million worth of cryptocurrency the day after from Gala Games.
Shore Regional High School District discloses a security incident occurred more than one year ago.

author: REF4578
description: Researchers at Elastic Security Labs and Antiy reveal the details of a malicious crypto mining campaign codenamed 'REF4578,' deploying a malicious payload named GhostEngine that uses vulnerable drivers to turn off security products and deploy an XMRig miner.
Western Sydney University (WSU) notifies students and academic staff about a data breach after threat actors breached its Microsoft 365 and Sharepoint environment.

author: INC
description: First Nations Health Authority (FNHA) discloses to have suffered a cyber attack. The INC ransomware gang claims responsibility for the attack.
Researchers from Datadog discover some malicious PyPI packages targeting highly specific MacOS machines

author: RansomHub
description: The Matadero de Gijón is hit with a RansomHub ransomware attack.
The Association of California School Administrators (ACSA) informs nearly 55,000 individuals that their information may have been compromised as a result of a ransomware attack.

author: RansomHouse
description: The RansomHouse threat actors claim to have encrypted the system of United Urology Group and exfiltrated about 300 GB of files.

target: Mālama I Ke Ola Health Center
description: The Mālama I Ke Ola Health Center discloses to have suffered a cyberattack
Prescription management company Sav-Rx warns over 2.8 million people in the United States that it suffered a data breach, stating that their personal data was stolen in a 2023 cyberattack.
Officials in Albany County, New York’s state capital region, say they are investigating a cyberattack ahead of the Memorial Day weekend.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The Seattle Public Library is hit with a ransomware attack.
The Internet Archive is hit with a prolonged DDoS attack.
The Greater Amsterdam School District discloses that a data breach potentially led to the unauthorized access of protected student information.

Researchers from Sonatype uncover “pytoileur,” a malicious package on the Python Package Index (PyPI) posing as an “API Management tool written in Python,” able to download and installs trojanized Windows binaries.

author: Ghostr
description: Computer hardware manufacturer Cooler Master suffers a data breach after a threat actor breached the company's website and claimed to steal the Fanzone member information of 500,000 customers.

The BBC discloses a data security incident that occurred on May 21, involving unauthorized access to files hosted on a cloud-based service, compromising the personal information of BBC Pension Scheme members.
Spanish multinational electrical utility Iberdrola says a cyber incident to a supplier in the beginning of May resulted in a data breach involving 850,000 Spanish customers.

author: FlyingYeti (overlapping with UAC-0149)
description: Researchers from Cloudflare discover a campaign carried out by a Russian threat actor dubbed FlyingYeti, targeting individuals in Ukraine.

The University of Chicago Medical Center reveals that a phishing incident involving the emails of workers at University of Chicago Medical Center may have exposed the personal information of about 10,300 people.
The Japanese cryptocurrency exchange DMM Bitcoin announces that threat actors stole 4,502.9 Bitcoin (BTC), approximately $304 million (48.2 billion yen), from the its wallets.
Oil and gas giant Shell says it is investigating a possible cybersecurity "incident" involving a third-party.

author: BlackSuit
description: Special Health Resources suffers a BlackSuit ransomware attack.
Malwarebytes discover a cryptocurrency scam spread via Whatsapp.

target: Official Microsoft India account on X (formerly Twitter)
description: The official Microsoft India account on X (formerly Twitter), with over 211,000 followers, is hijacked by cryptocurrency scammers to impersonate Roaring Kitty, the handle used by notorious meme stock trader Keith Gill.
Verny, a popular Russian discount retail chain with over 1,000 stores nationwide is hit by a cyberattack over the weekend that disrupts its services for several days.

author: Qilin
description: A Qilin ransomware attack affecting pathology and diagnostic services provider Synnovis impacts healthcare services at multiple major NHS hospitals in London.

author: GhostR
description: The threat actor known as GhostR claims to have stolen data from Australian logistics company Victorian Freight Specialists.
The Vietnam Post is hit with a ransomware attack.

author: Daixin Team
description: Daixin Team adds the Dubai Municipality to its dark web leak site.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: NoName057(16)
description: Santa Barbara Systems, a General Dynamics subsidiary in Spain that is refurbishing Leopard tanks for delivery to Ukraine, suffers a cyberattack on its website, by pro-Russia group NoName057(16).
The town of Arlington discloses that it had lost nearly $446,000 in a monthslong business email compromise (BEC) scam.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: CoinGecko, the world’s largest independent cryptocurrency data aggregator, experiences a data breach through its third-party email platform, GetResponse.
Loopring announces a security breach involving its two-factor authentication service Guardian, affecting two wallets, with one of them was drained of about $5 million.
A popular Japanese video-sharing platform, Niconico, is investigating a cybersecurity incident that forced the company to suspend its services.

target: United Seating and Mobility d/b/a Numotion
description: United Seating and Mobility, a provider of wheelchair and mobility equipment that does business as Numotion, discloses that an unauthorized third party had access to its computer systems and used ransomware to encrypt files. 602,000 individuals are affected.
The UwU Lend crypto platform says it has made an offer to a threat actor behind the theft of nearly $20 million worth of ETH.

The City of Cleveland, Ohio, is currently dealing with a cyberattack that has forced it to take citizen-facing services offline, including the public offices and facilities at Erieview and the City Hall. Few days later the city confirms a ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Traverse City is hit with a ransomware attack and shuts down the IT infrastructure.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The city of Newburgh is hit with a ransomware attack and shuts down the IT infrastructure.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

target: Two undisclosed users of the OKX cryptocurrency exchange
description: The OKX cryptocurrency exchange and security partner SlowMist investigate a multi-million dollar exploit through a SIM swap attack, that resulted in two stolen user accounts.
American financial services holding company Globe Life says attackers may have accessed consumer and policyholder data after breaching one of its web portals.

author: Black Basta
description: PCBA manufacturing giant Keytronic warns it suffered a data breach after the Black Basta ransomware gang leaked 530GB of the company's stolen data two weeks ago.
The Association of Texas Professional Educators (ATPE) sends out breach notifications warning of a cyberattack that exposed sensitive information.

target: County of Los Angeles’ Department of Public Health
description: The County of Los Angeles’ Department of Public Health (DPH) has disclosed a data breach impacting the personal information of 200,000 individuals.
Amtrak reveals that the Guest Rewards Accounts were hacked in credential stuffing attacks
Richland School District is left without phones and Internet, after someone gained unauthorized access to the network.
Consulting Radiologists notifies more than 500,000 individuals that their sensitive information was accessed and potentially acquired by threat actors earlier this year.

author: DoppelGänger
description: Researchers from Bot Blocker discover a campaign attributed to the pro-Kremlin disinformation network DoppelGänger that spread thousands of images on social media with fake anti-Ukraine quotes falsely credited to celebrities, including Jennifer Aniston, Scarlett Johansson and Elton John.

author: Threat actors from Russia
description: Russian threat actors could be behind the disruption to TVP, an online broadcast of the Euro 2024 soccer tournament, during the Polish national team’s opening match against the Netherlands.
The health maintenance organization (HMO) Maxicare reports a data breach affecting the personal information of some 13,000 members.

author: Black Basta
description: Spanish engineering and technology firm Amper Group falls victim to a cyberattack by the Black Basta group with the ransomware-as-a-service outfit stealing 650 gigabytes of sensitive data.

author: BlackSuit
description: Car dealership software-as-a-service provider CDK Global is hit by a massive cyberattack, causing the company to shut down its systems and leaving clients unable to operate their business normally.

author: Sp1d3r
description: Advance Auto Parts confirms it suffered a data breach after a threat actor attempted to sell stolen data on a hacking forum earlier this month. The breach allegedly stemmed from the Snowflake attack
Forklift manufacturer Crown Equipment confirms that it suffered a cyberattack earlier this month that disrupted manufacturing at its plants.
CDK Global suffers an additional breach as it was starting to restore systems shut down in an previous cyberattack.
An email account hack leads to a data breach at Ventura County Credit Union (VCCU). The incident impacts nearly 45,000 individuals.

Clothing company Levi Strauss informs 72,000 customers that their passwords have been reset after it detected a credential stuffing attack on their account. Attackers may have obtained information such as name, address, email address, order history, and possibly partial payment card information.
Turkey’s biggest cryptocurrency market BtcTurk says that their exchange had been hacked, with the assets stolen possibly amounting to nearly 51 million euros.

author: Threat actors from North Korea (Lazarus Group)
description: CoinStats reveals to have suffered a massive security breach that compromised 1,590 cryptocurrency wallets, draining over $2 million in virtual assets, with the attack suspected to have been carried out by North Korean threat actors.

Researchers from Defiant reveal that multiple WordPress plugins have been backdoored to inject malicious code that makes it possible to create rogue administrator accounts with the aim of performing arbitrary actions.

author: Brain Cipher
description: The Indonesian National Cyber and Encryption Agency (BSSN) reveals that the Brain Cipher ransomware disrupted the Temporary National Data Center server, affecting the operations of 210 government institutions, including immigration services at Soekarno-Hatta International Airport.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: The malware analysis service Any.Run shares details on a recent phishing attack targeting its employees.

target: South Africa’s National Health Laboratory Service
description: South Africa’s National Health Laboratory Service (NHLS) confirms to be dealing with a ransomware attack.

author: Lazarus Group
description: Bitcoin decentralized finance protocol Alex Lab says that a $4 million exploit it suffered last month is likely linked to North Korea Lazarus Group.

target: The Ambulatory Surgery Center of Westchester
description: The Mount Kisco Surgery Center LLC d/b/a The Ambulatory Surgery Center of Westchester ("ASCW") discloses a security breach after the compromise of an employee's email.
Researchers from Malwarebytes observe a new campaign distributing the Poseidon stealer targeting Mac users via malicious Google ads for the Arc browser.

Researchers from Sansec reveal that the critical vulnerability called CosmicSting (CVE-2024-34102) impacting around 75% of Adobe Commerce and Magento e-commerce sites, is currently exploited in the wild.
Local authorities in Crimea warn of internet disruptions from distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks targeting telecommunication providers.
Life insurance company Landmark Admin sends notifications to an unknown number of individuals about a data breach impacting personal, medical, and insurance information.
Installers for three different software products (Notezilla, RecentX, and Copywhiz) developed by an Indian company named Conceptworld have been trojanized to distribute information-stealing malware.
Human Technology discloses a security incident.

author: dAn0n
description: Pediatric Urology Associates is allegedly hit with a dAn0n ransomware attack.
The helpdesk portal of Mercku, a router maker, is sending MetaMask phishing emails in response to newly filed support tickets, in what appears to be a compromise.
Patelco Credit Union discloses it experienced a ransomware attack that led to the proactive shutdown of several of its customer-facing banking systems to contain the incident's impact.

author: Threat actors from Russia
description: Polish prosecutors investigate a suspected Russian cyberattack on the country’s state news agency Polish Press Agency (PAP) spreading disinformation with fake news claiming the country’s authorities had announced a partial mobilization of 200,000 men who were to be sent to fight in a war in Ukraine.
SysInformation Healthcare Services, LLC ("SysInformation"), d/b/a EqualizeRCM discloses a ransomware attack.
Florida Community Health Centers (FCHC) discloses to have suffered a ransomware attack affecting nearly 300,000 people.
A threat actor compromised Ethereum's mailing list provider and sent to over 35,000 addresses a phishing email with a link to a malicious site running a crypto drainer.
The Alabama State Department of Education says it stopped a ransomware attack last month but threat actors were still able to access some data and disrupt services.
Roll20, a popular online tabletop platform for role-playing games (RPGs), reveals that its systems were breached.
Nearly three months after a ransomware attack disrupted phone lines, computer services and Wi-Fi across Solano County's public libraries, systems are still down.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Cedar Falls officials are investigating a ransomware event that was detected in June 2024.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Turla (a.k.a. Uroburos)
description: Researchers from G Data discover a new campaign by the Russian cyber espionage group Turla using malicious shortcut files to deploy a fileless backdoor into the system.
The Frankfurt University of Applied Sciences announced on Monday it was targeted by “a serious hacker attack” that has led to a total shutdown of its IT systems.

author: BlackSuit
description: Monroe County is hit with a BlackSuit ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: General Motors (GM) suffers what appears to be a credential stuffing attack, affecting 65 GM MyAccounts.

author: Smishing Triad
description: Researchers from Resecurity discover a surge in fraudulent smishing attacks carried out by the Smishing Triad threat actor, and impersonating India Post, the government-operated postal system.

target: At least five Macau government websites
description: At least five Macau government websites are knocked offline by suspected foreign hackers for almost an hour.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

description: Clay County, Indiana files a local disaster declaration following a ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: SiegedSec
description: The hacktivist group “SiegedSec” claims responsibility for a data breach at the Heritage Foundation, stealing details of a potentially controversial “Project 2025.”

AT&T warns of a massive data breach where threat actors stole the call logs for approximately 109 million customers, or nearly all of its mobile customers, from an online database on the company's Snowflake account.

author: RansomHub
description: Pharmacy giant Rite Aid confirms a data breach after suffering a cyberattack in June, which was claimed by the RansomHub ransomware operation. The breach impacts 2.2 million customers.
Decentralized finance protocol Dough Finance loses $1.8 million in digital assets after threat actors executed a flash loan attack.

Researchers from Phylum discover img-aws-s3-object-multipart-copy and legacyaws-s3-object-multipart-copy, two fake AWS packages downloaded hundreds of times from the open source NPM JavaScript repository containing carefully concealed code that backdoored developers' computers when executed.
Bassett Furniture Industries says it shut down some of its information technology systems after it discovered a ransomware attack.
Decentralized finance platform LI.FI protocol suffers an $11 million exploit following suspicious withdrawals.

Researchers at Huntress reveal that the JavaScript downloader malware known as SocGholish (aka FakeUpdates) is being used to deliver a remote access trojan called AsyncRAT as well as a legitimate open-source project called BOINC (Berkeley Open Infrastructure Network Computing Client).

author: Threat actors from North Korea
description: Indian crypto exchange WazirX has revealed it lost virtual assets valued at over $230 million after a cyber attack that has since been linked to North Korea.

author: Multiple threat actors
description: The U.S. cybersecurity agency Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) says that though the CrowdStrike outage was not linked to a cyberattack or malicious activity, it has “observed threat actors taking advantage of this incident for phishing and other malicious activity.”

author: Multiple threat actors
description: The U.K. National Cyber Security Center (NCSC) also warns that it observed an increase in phishing messages aiming to take advantage of the Crowdstrike outage.
Florida-based safety equipment giant Cadre Holdings discloses a cyberattack that has impacted some of the company’s operations.

Web3 identity solutions provider Fractal ID reveals that a threat actor recently managed to exfiltrate data belonging to 6,300 users after compromising credentials for an operator account that had admin privileges.

author: Hunters International
description: Northeast Rehabilitation Hospital Network (“NRHN”) suffers a Hunters International ransomware attack.
A malicious campaign delivers the Remcos RAT as a fake Crowdstrike Hotfix, targeting BBVA Bank customers.

author: Handala
description: The pro-Iranian hacktivist group Handala distributes a data wiper under the pretense of delivering an update from CrowdStrike to Israeli companies.
Researchers at Crowdstrike warm that threat actors are exploiting the situation to distribute Remcos RAT to its customers in Latin America under the guise of providing a hotfix.

Several popular Ukrainian news channels on Telegram are hacked over the weekend to spread “provocative messages,” after the Russia-owned service called FleepBot, used to schedule posts, automate responses and manage content is compromised.
Researchers at Cyfirma warn that the Crowdstrike incident is being used for conducting scams and malware delivery worldwide.

target: Superior Court of Los Angeles County (LASC)
description: The largest trial court in the United States, the Superior Court of Los Angeles County, closed all 36 courthouse locations on Monday to restore systems affected by a Friday ransomware attack.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Akira
description: The Split St Jerome Airport is hit with an Akira ransomware attack.

author: Daixin

target: Several large telecom operators in Russia, including Beeline, Megafon, Tele2 and Rostelecom.
description: Ukraine’s military intelligence (HUR) also claims responsibility for a DDoS attack to several large telecom operators in Russia.

description: Threat actors known as GhostR claim to have stolen more than 50 GB of files on loan borrowers from the Singapore MLCB (the Moneylenders Credit Bureau). The attack was carried out on Ezynetic Pte. Ltd and affected 12 moneylenders using their services.
Daniel Freund, a German member of Europe’s Parliament says his mobile phone was targeted with the Candiru mobile spyware on May.

author: Cyber Anarchy Squad
description: A pro-Ukrainian hacker group, known as Cyber Anarchy Squad, claims it hacked the Russian information security firm Avanpost and leaked a trove of its data.
The City of Columbus, Ohio, says it's investigating whether personal data was stolen in a ransomware attack that disrupted the City's services.
target_class: Public admin and defence, social security

author: Zeus

description: The sensitive data of several Israeli athletes in the Paris Olympic Games is published on Telegram in an alleged doxing attack by a group calling itself "Zeus".
Microsoft says that a DDoS attack led to an eight hour outage involving its Azure portal, as well as some Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Purview services.
OneBlood, a large not-for-profit blood center that serves hospitals and patients in the United States, is dealing with an IT systems outage caused by a ransomware attack.

author: Moonstone Sleet
description: Researchers from Datadog reveal that the North Korea-linked threat actor known as Moonstone Sleet has continued to push malicious npm packages to the JavaScript package registry with the aim of infecting Windows systems.

author: WeRedEvils
description: Israel-based hacktivists from the group WeRedEvils take credit for an ongoing internet outage in Iran.
Decentralized finance protocol Convergence suffers a smart contract exploit that allows a threat actor to mint and sell $210,000 worth of native tokens and steal $2,000 in unclaimed staking rewards,

target: Grand Palais Réunion des musées nationaux (Rmn)
description: The Grand Palais Réunion des musées nationaux (Rmn) in France warns that it suffered a cyberattack.

author: Qilin

A threat actor breaches Mobile Guardian, a digital classroom management platform used worldwide, and remotely wipes data from at least 13,000 student's iPads and Chromebooks.
I-GRIP, a global stop-payment mechanism created by INTERPOL successfully recovers over $40 million stolen in a BEC attack on a company in Singapore.

The Port of Tyne confirma its site was down for some time, following a distributed denial of service (DDOS) attack.
The decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol Nexera falls victim to a significant exploit, resulting in the theft of approximately $1.8 million worth of digital assets.
Russia's Kursk region is hit by a “massive” distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack amid Ukraine’s surprise cross-border incursion.

author: BlackSuit
description: The city of Killeen, Texas reveals to be recovering from a BlackSuit ransomware attack.

author: Mint Sandstorm

description: Researchers at Microsoft reveal that Mint Sandstorm also unsuccessfully attempted to log in to an account belonging to a former presidential candidate.

Unicoin, a prominent cryptocurrency company notifies the SEC that a threat actor broke into its systems and locked all of the company’s employees out before taking several actions that are still being investigated.

CSC ServiceWorks, a leading provider of commercial laundry services and air vending solutions, discloses a data breach after the personal information of over 35,000 individuals was exposed in a 2023 cyberattack.
Luxembourg-based chemicals and manufacturing giant Orion SA notifies US regulators that it will lose out on around $60 million after it was targeted by a criminal wire fraud scheme.

author: Everest Team
description: The threat actor(s) known as Everest Team add Gramercy Surgery Center (“Gramercy”) to its leak site, and claims to have acquired more than 460 GB of files.
Surgery Center of Mid Florida ("SCOMF") discloses to have suffered a ransomware attack.
Evolution Mining informs that it has been targeted by a ransomware attack, which impacted its IT systems.

author: 3AM

Schlatter Group, a Swiss manufacturing company, suffers a ransomware attack.
Alabama Cardiology Group notifies nearly 281,000 current and past patients, physicians and employees that threat actors stole their sensitive information.
AutoCanada suffers a cyberattack that impacts the automobile dealership group's internal IT systems, which may lead to disruptions.
Elon Musk’s interview with US Presidential candidate Donald Trump on the X social media platform is impacted by technical glitches and what is a cyberattack.

author: LockBit

Phones and computers used by government workers in Flint, Michigan are facing outages due to a ransomware attack.

A “cyber incident” leaves the North Miami City Hall closed for nearly a week

A crypto user loses $55.47 million worth after falling victim to a sophisticated phishing attack targeting their Maker vault.

Researches at Wordfence reveal that threat actors have already started to exploit the critical severity vulnerability CVE-2024-28000 that affects LiteSpeed Cache, a WordPress plugin used for accelerating response times, a day after technical details become public.
Scammers hack the official McDonald’s Instagram page and make off with over $700,000 in Solana after using the fast food giant’s social media page to promote and rug a memecoin called “Grimace.”

author: RansomHub

DICK'S Sporting Goods, the largest chain of sporting goods retail stores in the United States, discloses that confidential information was exposed in a cyberattack.

author: SYSTEMADMINBD

The Pidgin messaging app removes the ScreenShareOTR plugin from its official third-party plugin list after it was discovered that it was used to install keyloggers, information stealers, and malware (including DarkGate) commonly used to gain initial access to corporate networks.

Fur Affinity, a popular social networking website for the furry community, is compromised, after threat actors successfully gained control of the website’s domain, redirecting users to phishing sites, crypto scams and other malicious content.
Medical Center Barbour, a small rural Alabama hospital notifies more than 61,000 patients that their sensitive information was potentially compromised in an October 2023 hacking incident.

author: Cl0p

The Seattle-Tacoma International Airport confirms that a cyberattack is likely behind the ongoing IT systems outage that disrupted reservation check-in systems and delayed flights over the weekend.
Park'N Fly warns that a data breach exposed the personal and account information of 1 million customers in Canada after threat actors breached its network.

author: BlackSuit
description: Young Consulting sends data breach notifications to 954,177 people who had their information exposed in a BlackSuit ransomware attack on April 10, 2024.
Banham Poultry, based in Attleborough, said criminals had remotely accessed its system in the early hours of 18 August, stealing the personal details of the staff.

Researchers at Proofpoint discover a new malware campaign spreading a previously undocumented backdoor named "Voldemort" to organizations worldwide, impersonating tax agencies from the U.S., Europe, and Asia.
country: DE FR IN IT JP UK US

CBIZ Benefits & Insurance Services (CBIZ) discloses a data breach that involves unauthorized access of client information stored in specific databases.

People who purchased tickets to visit Fota Wildlife Park in Cork, Ireland, are warned to cancel their bank cards following the discovery of a cyberattack that may have exposed the data on those cards.

Cisco’s site for selling company-themed merchandise is offline and under maintenance due to threat actors compromising it with JavaScript code that steals sensitive customer details provided at checkout exploiting CVE-2024-34102.
American car rental giant Avis notifies over 299,000 customers that unknown attackers breached one of its business applications last month and stole some of their personal information.

Richland County notifies 76,365 of a data security incident deriving from an unauthorized access to its network.

Russian anti-malware company Doctor Web (Dr.Web) discloses a security breach after its systems were targeted in a cyberattack over the weekend.

An X account hacking spree fuels a successful pump-and-dump scheme for the $HACKED Solana token, with people rushing to buy the coin. Hacked accounts include MoneyControl (1.4 million followers), People Magazine (7.8 million), and even EUinmyRegion (an account operated by the European Commission), with close to 100K followers.
Ethena Labs, the team behind the decentralized synthetic dollar protocol, temporarily deactivates its front end after threat actors compromised its domain registrar account.
Public accounting firm Wright, Moore, DeHart, Dupuis & Hutchinson (WMDDH) notifies over 127,000 individuals that their personal information was stolen in a July 2023 data breach.

author: Malone Lam and Jeandiel Serrano
description: The FBI arrests two men have been arrested and charges them in relation to their alleged involvement in a scam which saw almost a quarter of a billion dollars worth of cryptocurrency stolen from a single victim.
Users of the Telegram-based cryptocurrency trading bot Banana Gun have been drained of nearly $2 million worth of digital assets.
Reports emerge that even the users of the cryptocurrency trading bot Unibot are drained of digital assets.
Reports emerge that even the users of the cryptocurrency trading bot Maestro are drained of $200,000 worth of digital assets.
Singaporean crypto platform BingX says that more than $44 million was stolen from their platform in a cyberattack.

target: Muskogee City County Enhanced 911 Trust Authority

Shezmu, a crypto landing platform, suffers a $4.9 million worth hack after a storage vault is compromised. However the platform is able to recover the stolen funds within hours of successfully negotiating with the threat actor.

author: Hunters International

Money transfer giant MoneyGram confirms it suffered a cyberattack after dealing with system outages and customer complaints about lack of service since Friday.

Crypto scammers hijack OpenAI Newsroom, OpenAI's press account on X, formerly Twitter, to advertise a nonexistent token $OPENAI.
Arkansas City, a small city in Cowley County, Kansas, is forced to switch its water treatment facility to manual operations over the weekend to contain a cyberattack detected on Sunday morning.

author: Threat actors from Iran

However the company replies that there is no thret to sensitive data.

Richardson, a large Dallas suburb is dealing with a ransomware attack that has required help from the FBI to resolve.

description: U.K. transport officials and police say they are investigating a “cyber-security incident” that hit the public Wi-Fi networks at the country’s biggest railway stations and displayed an anti-Islam message in the login page.

Decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol Onyx is exploited for $3.8 million, using a known bug that had already been used to exploit Onyx previously.
University Medical Center Health System (UMC) in Lubbock is forced to divert ambulances after a ransomware attack shuts down many of its systems.
Global news agency AFP (Agence France-Presse) warns that it suffered a cyberattack, which impacted IT systems and content delivery services for its partners.
Crypto liquid restaking protocol Bedrock loses roughly $2 million in a security exploit. In return, the attacker is offered the job of securing the very protocol it stole from.
Mutua Madrileña suffers a cyber attack on its home customer base, through an external provider, which affects thousands of customers.

target: Users of Atomic, Trust Wallet, Metamask, Ronin, TronLink, Exodus, and other prominent wallets in the crypto ecosystem.

Universal Music Group informs hundreds of individuals about a recent data breach impacting their personal information.

The Vocational Training Center, or Berufsbildungszentrum (BBZ), in the canton of Schaffhausen is the victim of a ransomware attack.

Researchers at Malwarebytes discover a Fakebat (a.k.a. Eugenloader, PaykLoader) campaign where the malware is distributed via a malicious Google ad for the productivity application Notion.
Newpark Resources, a key supplier for oilfields says a ransomware attack caused disruptions and limited access to certain systems.

GitHub projects are targeted with malicious commits and pull requests, in an attempt to inject backdoors into these projects.
Employee eligibility verification solutions provider Form I-9 Compliance suffers a data breach and its impact is far bigger than initially believed, reaching 190,000 people.
Business software maker Team Software (WorkWave) revealed this week that a recent data breach impacts nearly 100,000 individuals.

New Jersey-based mortgage loan provider AnnieMac Home Mortgage (American Neighborhood Mortgage Acceptance Company) informs over 171,000 individuals of a recent data breach.
Great Plains Regional Medical Center in Oklahoma notifies over 133,000 individuals that their personal information was compromised in a ransomware attack.
